name: Bournemouth Athletics Track
metaTitle: Kings Park Athletic Centre | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for Kings Park Athletic Centre in Bournemouth.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: **Current Status:** The track is currently undergoing repairs (expected reopening late Spring 2026). Normally open for club sessions and events.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pricing is managed by BCP Council. Contact the Sports Booking Centre for information on future track use and club hire.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An 8-lane 400m synthetic track with full field facilities, serving as the primary athletics hub for the Bournemouth area.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Limited free parking is available at the centre. Pay-and-display parking is available in the adjoining Kings Park car parks.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Kings Park Drive, Bournemouth, Dorset, BH7 7AF

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official BCP Council page for Kings Park Athletics Centre for updates on repair works.
